content: FASE 1: Reescribir prompt con nuevas reglas de motivación contextual + motivation_state field
FASE 2: Implementar prompt de pre-filtrado para gpt-4o-mini
FASE 3: Two-stage pipeline en analyze_matches (mini pre-filter → full analysis)
FASE 4: Env vars OPENAI_MODEL_MINI / OPENAI_MODEL_FULL configurables
FASE 5: Frontend - MotivationContextBlock muestra motivation_state badge + intelligence.js MOTIVATION_STATES
FASE 6: Lint + curl test + testing agent E2E
